title: Wallpaper Calculator - Rolls Needed for Your Room
description: Free wallpaper calculator. Calculate how many rolls of wallpaper you need based on room dimensions and pattern repeat. Avoid waste and shortages.
keywords: wallpaper calculator, wallpaper rolls calculator, how much wallpaper, wallpaper estimator, wall covering calculator
intro: Calculate how many rolls of wallpaper you need. Enter your room dimensions and roll specifications for an accurate estimate.

faq.q: How do I calculate wallpaper needed?
faq.a: Measure wall area (perimeter × height), subtract openings, then divide by the usable area per roll (considering pattern repeat waste).
Pattern repeat is the distance between identical points in the wallpaper design. Larger repeats mean more waste when matching patterns.

faq.q: What is a standard wallpaper roll size?
faq.a: US standard: 27" wide × 27 ft long (≈57 sq ft). European standard: 53cm wide × 10m long (≈5.3 sq m).
